record.tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Apply Validation Due View
record.trigger_conditions: Use only when repairing or verifying Operator Tools Registry / WBS09 - Validation Due review_after filter and sort after read-only discovery shows missing first filter/sort rows, one existing review_after exact-date/unset filter row, or wrong relative-date value.
record.input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, Playwright prerequisites, Airtable login in Chrome profile, the WBS09 native views manifest, TargetKey Operator Tools Registry::WBS09 - Validation Due, and ConfirmToken APPLY_WBS09_VALIDATION_DUE_VIEW.
record.output_contract: Writes logs, screenshots when enabled, pre/post readback JSON, and apply_validation_due_view_rollup.json under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR/dcoir_wbs09_apply_validation_due_view_*.
record.safety_preconditions: Exact single target only; exact double confirmation token; refuses unexpected existing filter/sort rows; only normalizes one existing review_after filter row to on-or-before today; does not create/delete views or delete rows. Requires after-click verification and independent refresh/reselect readback before promotion claims.
record.notes: Validated with v15 wrong-value repair evidence: apply ZIP dcoir_wbs09_apply_validation_due_view_20260511T033729Z_wrong_value_repair_v15_chatgpt.zip and independent readback ZIP dcoir_wbs09_view_panel_readback_20260511T033905Z_wrong_value_repair_v15_chatgpt.zip. Scope remains single target only; no broad rollout authorization.
